chat.emptyHint: Ask the Pi coding assistant anything

settings.piCommandDesc: Executable used to launch Pi in RPC mode
settings.modelDesc: Optional. Leave blank to let Pi use its configured default model
settings.thinkingLevelDesc: Reasoning level passed to Pi at startup
settings.toolsModeDesc: Controls which Pi tools are enabled for the assistant session
settings.persistentSessionDesc: Keep Pi session history on disk instead of using ephemeral chats
settings.sessionNameDesc: Session name passed to Pi when persistent sessions are enabled
settings.panelDetachedDesc: Show panel as a detached floating window
settings.panelPinnedDesc: Open the assistant as a standalone floating window instead of a panel
settings.panelPositionDesc: Default screen edge for the panel
settings.attachmentStyleDesc: How the panel attaches to the side
settings.panelHeightRatioDesc: How much of the screen height the panel should use (detached mode)
settings.panelWidthDesc: Set a custom width for the detached panel (in pixels)
settings.uiScaleDesc: Scale factor for plugin UI elements (1 = 100%)

errors.backendUnavailable: Pi backend is not ready yet
